steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills the possessive before ‘compelling narrative.’ The antecedent is ‘the epic poem The Poem of the Cid’ — a singular, non-human noun — so a singular possessive pronoun is needed.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'they’re': A contraction of ‘they are’ — cannot serve as a possessive. ✗
  • Choice B — 'its': The singular possessive pronoun for a non-human noun, matching ‘the epic poem.’ ✓
  • Choice C — 'their': A plural possessive; the antecedent is singular. ✗
  • Choice D — 'it’s': A contraction of ‘it is’ — cannot serve as a possessive. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
